title: PlayerDetector
description: Playerdetector is a customizable mod that detects when players are around you in your desirable range then sends a notification to you in chat when they are!
body: A playerdetector that detects when a player enters your specific range that you have chosen in the mod menu config or when pressing your selected keybind found in the keybinds section on minecraft. This mod is completely client sided and sends a message to only you with the players name how far they are and also makes a couple of ding sounds to go along with it!
